items.name: Handala (Iran-linked hacktivists)
items.targets: Stryker Corporation (US medical device manufacturer) - wiped 200K devices globally; Raz Zimmt (Israeli security analyst)
items.ttps: T1485 Data Destruction, T1561 Disk Wipe, T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1078 Valid Accounts, supply chain targeting

items.name: Iran MOIS (Ministry of Intelligence and Security)
items.targets: Multiple US and Middle East targets during ongoing Iran conflict; colluding with cybercriminals for enhanced operations
items.ttps: T1566 Phishing, T1078 Valid Accounts, T1071 Application Layer Protocol, nation-state espionage, wiper malware deployment

items.name: ShinyHunters
items.targets: Telus Digital (Canadian company) - claims 1 petabyte data theft; Ericsson US - employee and customer data breach
items.ttps: T1530 Data from Cloud Storage Object, T1213 Data from Information Repositories, T1567 Exfiltration Over Web Service, Salesforce exploitation

items.name: Akira Ransomware
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1083 File and Directory Discovery, double extortion

items.name: Qilin Ransomware
items.targets: Syed Professional Services, TDS Construction Group, Silvon Software Group
items.ttps: T1486 Data Encrypted for Impact, T1490 Inhibit System Recovery, T1059 Command and Scripting Interpreter, double extortion

items.name: Lazarus Group (North Korea)
items.targets: Ongoing campaigns targeting multiple sectors globally
items.ttps: T1566 Phishing, T1059 Command and Scripting Interpreter, T1071 Application Layer Protocol, supply chain compromise

items.name: Scattered Spider
items.targets: Referenced in context of Iran-linked Stryker attack analysis
items.ttps: T1078 Valid Accounts, T1621 Multi-Factor Authentication Request Generation, T1556 Modify Authentication Process, social engineering

items.name: Unknown TA - OAuth Device Code Abuse
items.ttps: T1550.001 Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token, T1528 Steal Application Access Token, T1566 Phishing, OAuth device code flow abuse, no password theft

items.name: Unknown TA - Cloudflare Anti-Bot Phishing
items.ttps: T1566.002 Phishing: Spearphishing Link, T1078 Valid Accounts, T1583.006 Acquire Infrastructure: Web Services, Cloudflare anti-bot feature abuse

items.name: DarkWebInformer (Threat Intelligence Source)
items.targets: HB Brantner (Austrian trailer manufacturer) - customer data and NDAs exfiltrated; Sweden E-Government Platform - full source code leaked from CGI Sverige; 26,500 IoT devices and 3,000 RTSP cameras in Saudi Arabia listed
items.ttps: T1213 Data from Information Repositories, T1039 Data from Network Shared Drive, T1078 Valid Accounts, infrastructure compromise

canada_landscape.summary: Russian hackers are actively targeting Canadian governments, businesses, and military according to cyber spy agency warnings. Two major Canadian data breaches occurred: Telus Digital suffered a massive breach with ShinyHunters claiming 1 petabyte data theft involving Salesforce systems, and Loblaw experienced a data breach exposing sensitive customer information. Canada has cancelled hundreds of visas over Iran connections amid heightened geopolitical tensions.
canada_landscape.retailers: Loblaw - data breach exposing sensitive customer information reported March 12, 2026
